note: Created HandshakeTimeoutTests.cs with 3 tests: UnreachablePeer_Handshake_TimesOut (verifies TimeoutException), UnreachablePeer_Device_ReportsNoHandshake (verifies null LastHandshakeTime and zero bytes), UnreachablePeer_Device_DisposesCleanly (verifies no crash/leak on dispose). All 3 tests pass.
